prompt: A polished high-fashion magazine cover portrait of a beautiful young office woman standing beside a floor-to-ceiling window in a bright modern corporate office, photographed in a refined editorial style. She faces slightly toward the camera with a calm, elegant, confident expression, her face intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. She has long dark brown hair styled in a thick side braid draped over one shoulder. She wears a fitted ribbed mock-neck knit top in deep navy blue with short sleeves and three gold shoulder buttons on the left side, tucked into a high-waisted black pencil skirt with a slim black belt. Her right hand is raised, holding a folded light-colored cleaning cloth against the glass, suggesting a symbolic lifestyle-fashion scene rather than literal cleaning; her left arm rests naturally by her side. Warm daylight streams in from the window, creating soft highlights on her clothing and skin, subtle reflections on the glass, and a luminous cityscape of tall office buildings outside. The interior background is softly blurred, showing a minimalist office with 1 potted plant, 1 desk, and 1 office chair. Compose the image vertically like a premium magazine cover, full body cropped around mid-calf, with the model centered slightly right to leave room for typography on the left. Add elegant editorial cover text in a Japanese fashion-magazine style: a very large serif masthead reading Office Muse across the upper left, with "Office" in white and "Muse" in deep blue; small uppercase text at the top left reading "CITY LIFE / BEAUTY / CAREER"; small issue text at the top right reading "JUNE 2024" and "VOL. 28". Include 5 additional text blocks: 1 Japanese subtitle under the main title, 1 left-column beauty section with the heading "BEAUTY" and Japanese body text, 1 left-column career section with the heading "CAREER" and Japanese body text, 1 large lower-left headline reading "Focus On You" with a short Japanese subline, and 1 lower-right circular callout with the heading "Interview" and Japanese text inside a translucent pale circle. Add 3 small blue rectangular tags near the lower left reading SKINCARE ROUTINE, WORK SMARTER, and MINDFUL LIFE. Overall mood: sophisticated, feminine, aspirational, urban, graceful, professional, luxurious, clean natural light, realistic digital photography with subtle fashion-retouching, premium Japanese magazine cover design.
